name: aster-pump-aftercare-mcp-server
description: Official MCP Streamable HTTP server for image analysis, ticket DB operations, status lookup, and simulated email.

tools.name: analyze_image
tools.description: Send an uploaded image or file to the Image AI service and return detected labels.

tools.name: create_ticket
tools.description: Insert analyzed support ticket information into PostgreSQL.

tools.name: update_technical_steps
tools.description: Store RAG troubleshooting steps on an existing support ticket.

tools.name: send_customer_email
tools.description: Send or simulate an email reply and mark the ticket completed.

tools.name: get_ticket
tools.description: Return one support ticket by ticket ID.

tools.name: get_latest_ticket_for_customer
tools.description: Return the latest support ticket for a customer email.

tools.name: get_tickets_for_customer
tools.description: Return all support tickets for a customer email, newest first.
